name: price_sync
description: Nightly refresh of ModelCatalog pricing + context windows from LiteLLM JSON + OpenRouter /models. Keeps context-% gauge and cost math current without a redeploy.
notes: Cloud Scheduler should hit POST /admin/price-sync on the configured schedule. The endpoint is admin-scoped (protected by Firebase auth when enabled). Infrastructure setup is manual or via Terraform — not managed by this application.
